commit_scope: The Form-OS face of the fourth sibling: (1) the UNIVERSAL walker — one emitted binary with no baked program loads node-table files through the fs port and runs them (any source with a grammar compiles to a table this binary runs); (2) self-JIT on heat — native alternatives lowered from the cells, dispatch flips at a runtime threshold with parity held; (3) organ ops with physical proofs — RAM set/get, real clock, entropy. Band three-way at 15; audit runs all three on real hardware.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker-emit.fk form-stdlib/tests/fourth-os-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/tests/fourth-walker-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker-emit.fk form-stdlib/tests/fourth-walker-emit-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker-emit.fk form-stdlib/tests/fourth-fixpoint-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker-emit.fk form-stdlib/tests/fourth-call-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/bmf-mini.fk form-stdlib/tests/bmf-mini-band.fk
local_validation.summary: fourth-os-band holds three-way at 15: the table-file serialization is canonical; the universal walker's emission is 2878 bytes, deterministic, program-independent constant tissue (loader and organ arms included — a divergent kernel would emit a different length and split the verdicts); the native lowering text is faithful ((1 + a)) and the jit emission is 2932 bytes; the organ program flattens to 23 rows carrying tags 13..16. The audit ran the physical half: ONE universal binary ran four table files — fib 317811, even/odd 1/0, a bmf-grammar-compiled program 22, organs 7 (RAM write-42-read-42, real epoch clock positive, two entropy draws differed). The self-JIT binary held parity across the flip: fib28 cold 19.3 ms walking, hot 3.0 ms after flipping at threshold 50 (6.4x at runtime), njit=26 walker-to-native crossings in the probe. All six prior fourth-kernel bands re-proven green.

observed_delta.organs_physical: ram set/get roundtrip, clock epoch positive, entropy draws differed, fs via loader + PUTC, cpu via compute

known_limitations.limitation: The self-JIT's native alternatives are compiled into the baked binary at emission; a FOREIGN table loaded by the universal binary has no pre-lowered natives — true runtime codegen (the binary re-emitting C through the toolchain port, or mmap codegen) is the full crystallization wire, named open.
known_limitations.follow_up: The universal binary already carries PUTC and the loader; the re-emit-and-exec lane composes from running parts.

known_limitations.limitation: Melt-on-cool is not wired — heat only rises within a run; learned-primitive's hysteresis is the named other half.
known_limitations.follow_up: A decay term on fk_heat plus a flip-back check lands it; the probe already shows what is needed.

known_limitations.limitation: Organ proofs cover cpu/fs/ram/clock/entropy; net, hmi (screen/audio), and gpu are port-shaped and named for m4f — the resource-port discipline holds their doors.
known_limitations.follow_up: Sockets via extern socket/connect declarations are the natural next organ; the quoteless constraint allows them.

known_limitations.limitation: RND uses arc4random (macOS/BSD native; glibc 2.36+ on Linux) — the audit names its conditions; older Linux needs the urandom-fd lane.
known_limitations.follow_up: If CI hosts lack arc4random, switch the RND arm to open/read on /dev/urandom through the same loader externs.

ci_validation.summary: PR gates run all seven fourth-kernel bands three-way.

deploy_validation.summary: form-stdlib additions ride the api image rebuild; the lattice ingests the updated fourth-kernel.form on the post-merge hook.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: No route behavior changes. The fourth sibling gains its Form-OS face: a universal program-loading walker (one binary, many programs — any grammar's compiled output runs without rebuild), heat-triggered crystallization at runtime with parity, and physical organ proofs for ram/clock/entropy beside the existing fs/cpu.
test_flows: fourth-os-band pins the table-file canonical, both emissions' exact lengths (cross-kernel text agreement via verdict-coupled lengths), the native-lowering text, and the organ table shape, three-way at 15.

fourth_kernel_audit.sh sections 8-10: one universal binary runs four table files with parity; the self-JIT binary flips at threshold 50 with parity and visible njit; the organ mask returns 7 on real hardware.
e2e_validation.summary: validate.sh seven bands 1 ok 0 divergent each; audit end-to-end universal + self-JIT + organs, all parity-gated.

phase_gate.gate: universal loading, heat-flip crystallization, and organ physicality proven; CI three-way + deploy ingest confirm the crossing
phase_gate.next: melt-on-cool; runtime codegen for foreign tables (the full crystallization wire); net/hmi/gpu organ ports (m4f); m4e2 heap + m4e3 real-recipe flattener toward the band ratchet
